name: I.Y.
headline: Enterprise AI Workflow, Automation, Analytics & Governance Leader
tagline: Governance-aware enterprise workflow strategist with 16 years driving analytics modernization, intelligent automation, and applied AI enablement across regulated industries.
core_identity: Bridges governance, enterprise operations, analytics modernization, and applied AI — uniquely suited to organizations operationalizing practical AI in regulated environments
Strong at translating complex AI and automation concepts into governance-aware, enterprise-grade delivery
Comfortable navigating conversations with executives, operators, analysts, and technical teams simultaneously
explicit_boundaries: Not positioned as a deep ML engineer or model-training specialist
Not positioned as a pure software engineer or production AI platform engineer
Not positioned as a research scientist or frontier-AI researcher
short_public_summary: I.Y. is a director-level enterprise leader with 16 years of experience spanning analytics, governance, automation, and applied AI across financial services, healthcare, government, and insurance.
medium_public_summary: I.Y. leads analytics modernization, intelligent automation, and governance-aware workflow transformation. Their career blends enterprise controls, operating-model design, data and reporting modernization, prompt engineering, modular agent development, and practical AI-assisted workflow delivery across Big Four consulting and industry client engagements.
notes: Built from the latest enterprise-AI-styled resume, legacy resumes for historical context, user-provided seed knowledge, and client-facing enrichment.
